name: Winter Soldier
text: Lethal Protector — Response: After you attack and defeat an enemy, remove 2 threat from a scheme.
real_text: Lethal Protector — Response: After you attack and defeat an enemy, remove 2 threat from a scheme.
flavor: "The Red Room trained me to do terrible things. I use those skills to safeguard others now."

linked_card.name: Bucky Barnes
linked_card.text: Cybernetically Enhanced — Action: Spend 1 resource of any type → search your deck and discard pile for Cybernetic Arm and put it into play. (Shuffle.)
linked_card.real_text: Cybernetically Enhanced — Action: Spend 1 resource of any type → search your deck and discard pile for Cybernetic Arm and put it into play. (Shuffle.)

name: Cybernetic Arm
text: Resource: Exhaust Cybernetic Arm → generate a [wild] resource for an [[Attack]] event. That event deals 1 additional damage.
real_text: Resource: Exhaust Cybernetic Arm → generate a [wild] resource for an [[Attack]] event. That event deals 1 additional damage.
flavor: "Bucky was a skilled fighter before the arm. With it, he's downright scary." —Steve Rogers

name: Black Widow
text: Response: After you play Black Widow from your hand, return an [[Attack]] event from your discard pile to your hand.
real_text: Response: After you play Black Widow from your hand, return an [[Attack]] event from your discard pile to your hand.

name: Arm Block
text: Hero Interrupt (attack/defense): When an enemy attacks, deal 3 damage to it. If you exhausted Cybernetic Arm to pay for this event, prevent all damage from that enemy's attack.
real_text: Hero Interrupt (attack/defense): When an enemy attacks, deal 3 damage to it. If you exhausted Cybernetic Arm to pay for this event, prevent all damage from that enemy's attack.

name: Metal Punch
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 7 damage to en enemy. If you exhausted Cybernetic Arm to pay for this event, this attack gains overkill.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 7 damage to en enemy. If you exhausted Cybernetic Arm to pay for this event, this attack gains overkill.

name: Electrical Discharge
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. If you paid for this event using a [energy] resource, stun that enemy.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. If you paid for this event using a [energy] resource, stun that enemy.
flavor: "They'd be just as shocked if you showed them your high school photo." —Black Widow

name: Safe House #30
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Safe House #30 → search the encounter deck for a minion and put it into play engaged with you. (Shuffle.) Then, draw 1 card.
real_text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Safe House #30 → search the encounter deck for a minion and put it into play engaged with you. (Shuffle.) Then, draw 1 card.
flavor: "You'll never guess who moved in next door." —Bucky Barnes

name: Silent Infiltration
text: Hero Response: After you attack and defeat an enemy, discard this card → ready your hero and confuse an enemy.
real_text: Hero Response: After you attack and defeat an enemy, discard this card → ready your hero and confuse an enemy.

name: Winter Armor
text: You get +3 hit points and gain steady.
real_text: You get +3 hit points and gain steady.
flavor: "The arm may be bulletproof, but the rest of me is still flesh and blood." —Winter Soldier

name: Winter Mask
text: You gain the [[Spy]] trait. Hero Response: After you attack and defeat an enemy, exhaust Winter Mask → draw 1 card.
real_text: You gain the [[Spy]] trait. Hero Response: After you attack and defeat an enemy, exhaust Winter Mask → draw 1 card.

name: Winter Rifle
text: Restricted. Hero Interrupt: When Winter Soldier makes a basic attack, exhaust Winter Rifle → Winter Soldier gets +2 ATK for this attack. This attack gains piercing and ranged.
real_text: Restricted. Hero Interrupt: When Winter Soldier makes a basic attack, exhaust Winter Rifle → Winter Soldier gets +2 ATK for this attack. This attack gains piercing and ranged.

name: Captain America
text: Toughness. Response: After Captain America enters play, ready a [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] character.
real_text: Toughness. Response: After Captain America enters play, ready a [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] character.

name: Deathlok
text: Response: After Deathlok enters play, search your deck and discard pile for a copy of S.H.I.E.L.D. Sidearm and attach it to him. (Shuffle.)
real_text: Response: After Deathlok enters play, search your deck and discard pile for a copy of S.H.I.E.L.D. Sidearm and attach it to him. (Shuffle.)
flavor: "My body is infused with high-tech, mind-controlled weaponry."

name: Firepower
text: Hero Action (attack): Exhaust up to 3 [[Weapon]] upgrades you control → for each weapon upgrade exhausted this way, choose an enemy and deal 3 damage to it. This attack gains ranged.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Exhaust up to 3 [[Weapon]] upgrades you control → for each weapon upgrade exhausted this way, choose an enemy and deal 3 damage to it. This attack gains ranged.

name: One by One
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to an enemy. If this attack defeats that enemy, deal 2 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to an enemy. If this attack defeats that enemy, deal 2 damage to an enemy.
flavor: "Lots of tricks up these sleeves, ladies and gentlemen." —Moon Girl

name: Spoiling for a Fight
text: Hero Action: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until you discard a minion. Put that minion into play engaged with you → ready your hero.
real_text: Hero Action: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until you discard a minion. Put that minion into play engaged with you → ready your hero.

name: Aggressive Stance
text: Max 1 per player. Hero Response: After you engage a minion, discard this card → search your deck for an [[Attack]] event and add it to your hand. (Shuffle.)
real_text: Max 1 per player. Hero Response: After you engage a minion, discard this card → search your deck for an [[Attack]] event and add it to your hand. (Shuffle.)

name: Bambino
text: Attach to a [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] character. While attached to an identity, this card gains restricted. Uses (3 ammo counters). Interrupt: When attached character makes a basic attack, remove 1 ammo counter from here → this attack deals 3 additional damage and gains overkill.
real_text: Attach to a [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] character. While attached to an identity, this card gains restricted. Uses (3 ammo counters). Interrupt: When attached character makes a basic attack, remove 1 ammo counter from here → this attack deals 3 additional damage and gains overkill.

name: Man on the Wall
text: Play only if your identity has the [[Soldier]] trait. Hero Action: Exhaust Man on the Wall → reduce the cost of the next card you play this phase by 1 for each minion engaged with you.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[Soldier]] trait. Hero Action: Exhaust Man on the Wall → reduce the cost of the next card you play this phase by 1 for each minion engaged with you.

name: S.H.I.E.L.D. Sidearm
text: Attach to a [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] character. Limit 1 per character. Uses (3 ammo counters). Interrupt: When attached character makes a basic attack, exhaust S.H.I.E.L.D. Sidearm and remove 1 ammo counter from it → deal 1 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Attach to a [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] character. Limit 1 per character. Uses (3 ammo counters). Interrupt: When attached character makes a basic attack, exhaust S.H.I.E.L.D. Sidearm and remove 1 ammo counter from it → deal 1 damage to an enemy.

name: Nick Fury, Sr.
text: Forced Response: After Nick Fury, Sr. enters play, choose one: Remove 3 threat from a scheme, draw 2 cards, or give a [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] character a tough status card. At the end of the round, if Nick Fury, Sr. is still in play, discard him.
real_text: Forced Response: After Nick Fury, Sr. enters play, choose one: Remove 3 threat from a scheme, draw 2 cards, or give a [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] character a tough status card. At the end of the round, if Nick Fury, Sr. is still in play, discard him.

name: Super-Soldiers
text: Team-Up (Captain America and Winter Soldier). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action (attack): Deal 6 damage to an enemy. Give Captain America and Winter Soldier each a tough status card.
real_text: Team-Up (Captain America and Winter Soldier). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action (attack): Deal 6 damage to an enemy. Give Captain America and Winter Soldier each a tough status card.

name: Winter, Widow, Soldier, Spy
text: Team-Up (Black Widow and Winter Soldier). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action (attack): Put a [[Preparation]] upgrade from your discard pile into play. Deal 4 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Team-Up (Black Widow and Winter Soldier). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action (attack): Put a [[Preparation]] upgrade from your discard pile into play. Deal 4 damage to an enemy.

name: Red Room Programming
text: Give to the Bucky Barnes player. You may flip to your alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Bucky Barnes → remove this card from the game. • Discard the highest printed cost card from your hand and take indirect damage equal to its cost. Discard this obligation.
real_text: Give to the Bucky Barnes player. You may flip to your alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Bucky Barnes → remove this card from the game. • Discard the highest printed cost card from your hand and take indirect damage equal to its cost. Discard this obligation.

name: Crossbones
text: Quickstrike. [star] Forced Response: After Crossbones attacks and defeats an ally, place 2 threat on the main scheme. (Winter Soldier's nemesis minion.)
real_text: Quickstrike. [star] Forced Response: After Crossbones attacks and defeats an ally, place 2 threat on the main scheme. (Winter Soldier's nemesis minion.)

name: Hydra Hit Squad
text: Each [[Hydra]] minion gets +1 ATK and +2 hit points. When Defeated: The player who defeated this scheme searches the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Hydra]] minion and reveals it. (Shuffle.)
real_text: Each [[Hydra]] minion gets +1 ATK and +2 hit points. When Defeated: The player who defeated this scheme searches the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Hydra]] minion and reveals it. (Shuffle.)
flavor: Crossbones commands his own team of hand-picked Hydra goons.

name: High-Tech Armament
text: Attach to Crossbones. Otherwise, attach to the villain. Forced Response: After you attach High-Tech Armament to an enemy, that enemy activates against you. Hero Action: Exhaust a character you control → discard this card.
real_text: Attach to Crossbones. Otherwise, attach to the villain. Forced Response: After you attach High-Tech Armament to an enemy, that enemy activates against you. Hero Action: Exhaust a character you control → discard this card.

name: Hydra Mercenary
text: Guard. (While this minion is engaged with you, you cannot attack the villain.)
real_text: Guard. (While this minion is engaged with you, you cannot attack the villain.)

name: White Widow
text: Response: After you resolve the ability of a [[Preparation]] card you control, heal damage from White Widow equal to that card's printed resource cost.
real_text: Response: After you resolve the ability of a [[Preparation]] card you control, heal damage from White Widow equal to that card's printed resource cost.

name: S.H.I.E.L.D. Deputy
text:
Play only if your identity has the [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] trait.
Attach to a friendly character.
Attached character gets +1 hit point and gains the [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] trait.

Play only if your identity has the [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] trait.
Attach to a friendly character.

name: Blizzard
text: Villainous. Victory 1. [star] Forced Response: After Blizzard attacks a character, search the encounter deck and discard pile for Encased in Ice and attach it to that character. (Shuffle.) Otherwise, stun the attacked character.
real_text: Villainous. Victory 1. [star] Forced Response: After Blizzard attacks a character, search the encounter deck and discard pile for Encased in Ice and attach it to that character. (Shuffle.) Otherwise, stun the attacked character.

name: Encased in Ice
text:
Attach to your identity.
Attached character cannot attack enemies other than this card.
Any player can attack this card as if it were a minion. If there is 3 or more damage here, move all but 3 damage here to attached character and discard this card.
real_text:
Attach to your identity.
Attached character cannot attack enemies other than this card.

name: Slippery Conditions
text: Forced Response: After an ally enters play, exhaust it.
real_text: Forced Response: After an ally enters play, exhaust it.

name: Whiteout
text:
When Revealed: Find Blizzard and reveal him. (If he is already in play, he engages you.) Blizzard activates against you. If no enemy activated this way, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: You are stunned. If you were already stunned, take 1 damage.
